title: galium pseudohumifusum
intro: Galium pseudohumifusum, also known as False Earthsmoke, is a perennial herb that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Galium pseudohumifusum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat wounds and skin conditions. Galium pseudohumifusum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
